privileged_info_summary: The patent landscape research task is based on real, publicly-accessible patent data from established sources: patents.google.com, USPTO.gov, and espacenet.com are all verified to be real, live patent databases. The research topic of wireless power transfer and inductive charging is a real technology domain with numerous granted US patents. Example verified patents include US8193764B2 (Wireless charging of electronic devices, granted 2012) and US9356659B2 (Chargers and methods for wireless power transfer, granted 2016). The specified keywords (wireless, power, charging, inductive, magnetic, coupling, transfer) are all relevant to this technology domain. US patent number format follows the pattern USxxxxxxxx with letter suffixes (e.g., B2), and grant dates follow ISO 8601 (YYYY-MM-DD) format. The data is not synthetic; the task requires users to find real patents from genuine patent databases.
